hyperedges.label: Confirm-then-delete UI pattern reused across clientes/leads/tickets/productos
Unified reminder/alert system spanning tasks and training appointments
Permission resolution system: roles, per-user overrides, superadmin bypass
Components implementing the inline-edit-in-list UI pattern
Phased responsive redesign (Fase 1 Shell, Fase 3 Kanban) sharing app/layouts/default.vue
Rediseño responsive por fases (Shell → SplitView Clientes → Kanban)
Patrón compartido de cron horario que notifica vencidos/archiva
Dos familias de patrón RLS: propiedad individual (owner_id) vs recurso/equipo compartido (sin owner_id)
